version: AMOS Daily Brief HTML Exporter Script v0.2
purpose: Export the Generated Brief sheet from the unified manual workbook into a standalone HTML daily brief.
guardrails: Do not treat sample/manual-ready Gann data as live market data.
If Data Freshness is Missing, no aggressive action.
Critical events default to No Attack unless setup is confirmed and risk is accepted.
Anchor Verification v0.2 is required before formal Gann use.
